testsuite.name: Chrome Headless 147.0.0.0 (Windows 10)

property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: DirectorDetail should create
DirectorDetail should default to a new director when no item is resolved
DirectorDetail should load volunteers for the embedded form
DirectorFiltersComponent should create
DirectorForm should create
DirectorForm should load volunteers on init
DirectorForm should initialise form with default values
DirectorForm should patch form when director input is provided
DirectorForm should populate name and personId when a volunteer is selected
DirectorForm should not change form when an unknown personId is selected
DirectorList should create
DirectorList should show no rows when directorsSignal is null
DirectorList should map directors to list items
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should create
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should have form controls for gameDate and gameTime as Date objects
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should set Date objects in form when editing existing record
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should combine date and time when saving
AdminGamesPlayoffsDetail - Date/Time Pickers should have isFormDirty method for PendingChangesGuard
HouseholdFilters should create
HouseholdFilters should initialize with letter A
HouseholdFilters should emit filters on letter change
HouseholdFilters should clear filters
PeopleFilters should create
PeopleFilters should initialize with letter A
PeopleFilters should emit filters on letter change
PeopleFilters should clear filters
PeopleList should create
PeopleList should show Register button only for players
PeopleList should not show Register button for non-players
PeopleList onRegister sets selected person before navigating
PeopleList onRegister navigates to player-registration with personId
PeopleList onRegister stops event propagation to prevent row navigation
AdminSeasonDetail should create
AdminSeasonDetail new season (seasonId === 0) calls postSeason, not putSeason
AdminSeasonDetail new season (seasonId === 0) shows created snackbar and navigates to list on success
AdminSeasonDetail new season (seasonId === 0) refreshes seasons list on success
AdminSeasonDetail new season (seasonId === 0) does not show snackbar when postSeason errors
AdminSeasonDetail new season (seasonId === 0) does not submit when form is invalid
AdminSeasonDetail existing season (seasonId > 0) calls putSeason, not postSeason
AdminSeasonDetail existing season (seasonId > 0) shows updated snackbar and navigates to list on success
AdminSeasonDetail save() field mapping maps currentSchedule and currentSignUps from form to the season passed to postSeason
AdminSeasonDetail save() field mapping passes the logged-in user id to postSeason
AlphabeticalSearch should highlight selected letter
AlphabeticalSearch should default to A on clear
AlphabeticalSearch should update criteria in PeopleService when letter is selected
AdminUserDetail should create
AdminUserDetail should initialise model with empty values for a new user
AdminUserDetail should have peopleSelectEnabled false on init until a household is selected
AdminUserDetail should expose houseId and peopleId fields on the signal form
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — positive: returns the household name
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — negative: returns empty string for null
AdminUserDetail displayHousehold — negative: returns empty string when name is undefined
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — positive: updates householdSearchText signal
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears houseId in model
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears peopleId and disables the select
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSearchInput — negative: clears peopleOptions
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: sets houseId in model
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: marks the form as dirty
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: updates householdSearchText to the name
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — positive: loads people for the selected household
AdminUserDetail onHouseholdSelected — negative: household with no name sets search text to empty
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — positive: calls searchByName after 300 ms debounce for ≥2 chars
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — negative: does not call searchByName for < 2 chars
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — negative: returns empty array on HTTP error
AdminUserDetail filteredHouseholds — debounce: only calls API once for rapid keystrokes
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — positive: sorts people by last name then first name
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — positive: enables peopleSelectEnabled after load
AdminUserDetail loadPeopleForHousehold — negative: clears peopleOptions on error
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — true when userId is 0 and no householdName
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — false when householdName is set
AdminUserDetail showHouseholdDropdown — false when editing an existing user (userId > 0)
AdminUsersList should create and render rows
PlayerBalance should create
PlayerHistory should create
PlayerList should create
PlayerList should load players on init when season is available
PlayerList should update players when season changes
PlayerList should update players when division changes
PlayerList should navigate to player registration on row click
PlayerList should set isLoading to true while fetching
PlayerList should handle HTTP errors gracefully
PlayerList should display player data in correct columns
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should create the component
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should have default input values
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should accept custom configuration values
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should initialize with loading state
AdminListDetailShell Component Initialization should initialize with error state
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render the title
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render the add button when showAddButton is true
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should not render the add button when showAddButton is false
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render custom add button text
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render table with correct columns
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render table rows with data
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render table cells with correct data
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should render actions column when showActionsColumn is true
AdminListDetailShell Table Display should not render actions column when showActionsColumn is false
AdminListDetailShell Computed Signals should compute displayedColumns correctly without actions
AdminListDetailShell Computed Signals should compute displayedColumns correctly with actions
AdminListDetailShell Computed Signals should filter out invisible columns
AdminListDetailShell Computed Signals should compute hasFilterContent as false when no filter projected
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should use valueGetter when provided
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should apply custom cellClass when provided
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should apply custom headerClass when provided
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should apply width styles when provided
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should enable sorting for sortable columns
AdminListDetailShell Column Configuration should not enable sorting for non-sortable columns
AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should emit addClick when add button is clicked
AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should emit rowClick when a row is clicked
AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should not emit rowClick when rowClickable is false
AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should call onRowClick method when row is clicked
AdminListDetailShell Event Emissions should call onAdd method when add button is clicked
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show loading spinner when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show loading text when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should hide table when isLoading is true
AdminListDetailShell Loading State should show table when isLoading is false
AdminListDetailShell Error State should show error message when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should show error icon when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should hide table when errorMessage is set
AdminListDetailShell Error State should not show error message when errorMessage is null
AdminListDetailShell Error State should have proper ARIA role for error message
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show default empty state when no data
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state icon
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state message
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show empty state hint when showAddButton is true
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should not show empty state hint when showAddButton is false
AdminListDetailShell Empty State should show custom add button text in empty state hint
AdminListDetailShell Pagination should render paginator
AdminListDetailShell Pagination should use custom page size options
AdminListDetailShell Pagination should use custom default page size
AdminListDetailShell Pagination should use custom aria label
AdminListDetailShell Pagination should show first/last buttons
AdminListDetailShell Sorting and Pagination Integration should wire up sort to dataSource after view init
AdminListDetailShell Sorting and Pagination Integration should wire up paginator to dataSource after view init
AdminListDetailShell Sorting and Pagination Integration should handle null dataSource gracefully
AdminListDetailShell Row Styling should apply clickable-row class when rowClickable is true
AdminListDetailShell Row Styling should not apply clickable-row class when rowClickable is false
AdminListDetailShell Content Projection should project filter content
AdminListDetailShell Content Projection should show filter section when filter content is projected
AdminListDetailShell Content Projection should project detail form content
AdminListDetailShell Accessibility should have proper ARIA label on paginator
AdminListDetailShell Accessibility should use custom ARIA label when provided
AdminListDetailShell Accessibility should have role="alert" on error message
SponsorFilters should create
SponsorFilters should emit initial filter values synchronously on init
SponsorFilters should emit initial values reflecting the filters input
SponsorFilters should not emit for form changes before 300 ms
SponsorFilters should emit after 300 ms debounce when form value changes
SponsorFilters should emit only once when multiple rapid changes occur within 300 ms
SponsorFilters should reset name and currentSeasonOnly when clearFilters() is called
SponsorFilters should return false for hasActiveFilters when form is empty
SponsorFilters should return true for hasActiveFilters when name is non-empty
SponsorFilters should return true for hasActiveFilters when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorFilters should return false for hasActiveFilters after clearFilters()
SponsorFilters should patch the form when filters input changes after first render
SponsorFilters should not patch the form on the first ngOnChanges (ngOnInit handles first patch)
SponsorList should create
SponsorList should call fetchCurrentSeason on init
SponsorList should map sponsorProfileId to id for BaseList compatibility
SponsorList should expose empty list before HTTP response arrives
SponsorList should handle an empty HTTP response
SponsorList should set isLoading to false after successful response
SponsorList should set isLoading to false and keep sponsors empty on HTTP error
SponsorList should define a spoName column
SponsorList should define a lastSeasonDescription column
SponsorList should show all sponsors when no filter is active
SponsorList should filter sponsors by name substring
SponsorList should filter sponsors by name case-insensitively
SponsorList should return no results when name filter matches nothing
SponsorList should show all sponsors when name filter is cleared
SponsorList should show no sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true and season is not loaded
SponsorList should show all sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is false regardless of season
SponsorList should filter to only current-season sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should exclude sponsors with no season history when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should exclude past-season-only sponsors when currentSeasonOnly is true
SponsorList should reactively update when currentSeason signal changes
SponsorList should apply name and currentSeasonOnly filters together
SponsorList should return nothing when name matches a past-season sponsor with currentSeasonOnly active
ContentEdit Component Initialization should create
ContentEdit Component Initialization should initialize with correct default values
ContentEdit Component Initialization should initialize form with correct structure and validators
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate title field correctly
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate subtitle field correctly
ContentEdit Form Validation should validate expiration date field correctly
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should populate form when content is retrieved
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should set page title correctly for new content
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should set page title correctly for existing content
ContentEdit Content Loading and Effects should compute content types correctly
ContentEdit Save Functionality should save content when form is valid and dirty
ContentEdit Save Functionality should not save content when form is invalid
ContentEdit Save Functionality should not save content when form is not dirty
ContentEdit Save Functionality should create WebContent object with correct values when saving
ContentEdit Save Functionality should handle save error and not navigate
ContentEdit Save Functionality should reset form after successful save
ContentEdit Delete Functionality should delete content when webContentId is not 0
ContentEdit Delete Functionality should not delete content when webContentId is 0
ContentEdit Delete Functionality should handle delete error and not navigate
ContentEdit Helper Methods should format text correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should convert values to numbers correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should return correct float label value
ContentEdit Helper Methods should detect form dirty state correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should get web content type correctly
ContentEdit Helper Methods should handle input events
ContentEdit Update Method should update form with content values
ContentEdit Update Method should format text and log it
ContentEdit Error Handling should have hasError method that returns empty string
AuthGuard should allow activation when logged in
AuthGuard should redirect to login with returnUrl when not logged in
AuthGuard should allow load when logged in
AuthGuard should block load when not logged in
GameScoreDialog renders team labels with fallback display values when team names are empty
AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) should be created
AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn returns false when no user is set
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn returns true after a user is set
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isLoggedIn

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns false when no user
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns false for userType 1 (regular user)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns true for userType 2 (admin)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin returns true for userType 3 (super-admin)
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) isAdmin

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false when no user
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false when no division selected
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns true for admin user regardless of division assignment
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns false for non-admin user without a matching division
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames returns true for non-admin user with a matching division
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) canEditGames

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) initializeAuth (HTTP path) leaves currentUser undefined when server returns null
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) initializeAuth (HTTP path)

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) setUserState sets currentUser and dispatches a store action
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) setUserState

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login POSTs credentials and sets user state on success
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login propagates error on failed login
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) login

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout clears user session after successful logout response
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout clears user session even when logout request errors
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logout

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logoutDueToInactivity clears the user session
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) logoutDueToInactivity

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) getSessionInfo delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) getSessionInfo

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) hasValidSession delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) hasValidSession

testcase.name: AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) recordActivity delegates to userActivityService
testcase.classname: .AuthService when no stored session (HTTP path) recordActivity

testcase.name: AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path) restores user from localStorage without making an HTTP call
testcase.classname: .AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path)

testcase.name: AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path) calls recordActivity to restart the inactivity timer
testcase.classname: .AuthService when a stored session exists (localStorage path)

testcase.name: YourService put should make a PUT request with the correct URL and data
YourService put should handle errors appropriately
YourService put should handle null response
YourService put should include custom headers in the request
DirectorService should be created
DirectorService fetchDirectors should fetch directors and update signal
DirectorService fetchDirectors should handle error when fetching directors
DirectorService create should create a new director
DirectorService update should update an existing director
DirectorService update should handle update errors
DivisionService should be created
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision sets the selectedDivision signal
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision persists the divisionId to localStorage when seasonId is available
DivisionService updateSelectedDivision updates currentDivision state via setCurrent
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions GETs divisions and updates seasonDivisions signal
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions selects the first division as default when none previously selected
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions preserves an existing selection when it is present in the new data
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions restores selection from localStorage when no existing selection
DivisionService getSeasonDivisions sets seasonDivisions to empty array on HTTP error
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when birthDate is missing
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when gender is missing
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when divisions array is empty
DivisionService findEligibleDivision matches the primary gender and date range
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when gender does not match any division
DivisionService findEligibleDivision returns undefined when birth date is out of range
DivisionService findEligibleDivision matches the secondary gender in a co-ed division
DivisionService getDivisionMinDate returns September 1st of (currentYear - years)
DivisionService getDivisionMaxDate returns August 31st of (currentYear - years)
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns TR2COED division with correct gender for Trainee 2 Coed
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns SI Boys division with male gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Int Girls division with female gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Women division with female gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns Men 18+ division with male gender
DivisionService getDefaultDivision returns an empty division for an unknown name
DivisionService save calls DataService.put when divisionId is not 0
DivisionService save calls DataService.post when divisionId is 0
DivisionService delete calls DataService.delete with the correct URL
DivisionService getmatchingDivision returns the canonical name when there is a case-insensitive match
DivisionService getmatchingDivision returns "Other" when there is no match
DivisionService setLoadingIndicator updates the isLoading state signal
DraftListService should be created
DraftListService getDraftList should fetch draft list for season and division
DraftListService getDraftList should fetch draft list for season without division
DraftListService getDraftList should handle error when fetching draft list
DraftListService getDraftList should set loading state while fetching
DraftListService clearPlayers should clear the players signal
GameService should be created
GameService validateScores returns true for two valid integer scores
GameService validateScores returns true for boundary scores of 0 and 0
GameService validateScores returns true for boundary scores of 150 and 150
GameService validateScores returns false when home score exceeds 150
GameService validateScores returns false when visitor score is negative
GameService validateScores returns false for non-integer scores
GameService validateScores returns false for NaN
GameService validateScores returns false for Infinity
GameService compare returns negative when a < b ascending
GameService compare returns positive when a > b ascending
GameService compare returns positive when a < b descending
GameService extractDate converts an ISO date string to a JS Date
GameService updateSelectedGame sets the selectedGame
GameService clearSelectedGame resets selectedGame to null
GameService updateSeasonGames stores the games in the internal signal
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate groups games that share the same calendar date
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate returns an empty array for empty input
GameService groupRegularGamesByDate creates one group per unique date
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns only games matching the selected division
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns games sorted by gameDate ascending
GameService filterGamesByDivision returns empty array when no seasonGames are loaded
GameService filterGamesByTeam emits an empty array when no team is selected
GameService seasonGamesCount returns 0 when no games are loaded
GameService seasonGamesCount returns the count of loaded season games
GameService fetchSeasonGames does nothing when no season is selected
GameService fetchSeasonGames GETs season games and updates the signal
GameService saveGame PUTs to the scores endpoint and updates selected game optimistically
HouseholdService should be created
HouseholdService searchByName should make a GET request to the correct URL with the name param
HouseholdService searchByName should return matching households from the API response
HouseholdService searchByName should return an empty array when the API returns no matches
HouseholdService searchByName should URL-encode special characters in the search term
HouseholdService searchByName should return a single household when API returns exactly one match
HouseholdService searchByName should propagate an HTTP error to the subscriber
HouseholdService searchByName should propagate a 404 error to the subscriber
PaginationPreferencesService should return the fallback when nothing is stored
PaginationPreferencesService should return a custom fallback when nothing is stored
PaginationPreferencesService should return the stored value when one exists
PaginationPreferencesService should overwrite a previously stored value
PaginationPreferencesService should write the page size to localStorage
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting should create
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting should format time with AM/PM format
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting should convert AM/PM time to 24-hour format
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting should normalize API playoff game with AM/PM time
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting formatLocalDateTime should return YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss with no timezone offset
PlayoffGameService - Time Formatting toApiModel should send a local datetime string (not UTC) for gameDate
SeasonService convertToSeasonApiFormat sets createdUser to the passed userId
SeasonService convertToSeasonApiFormat sets createdUser to null when no userId is provided
SeasonService convertToSeasonApiFormat maps onlineStarts/onlineStops to signUpsDate/signUpsEnd
SeasonService convertToSeasonApiFormat always sets companyId to 1
Login Component navigates to returnUrl on successful login
Login Component toggles hidePassword state
SectionTitle should create
ShellTitle should create
AppFeatureFlagDirective creates embedded view when flag enabled
AppFeatureFlagDirective does not create embedded view when flag disabled
adminGuard allows when adminModule flag enabled
adminGuard blocks when adminModule flag disabled
NoticeTypesService should be created
